channel.title: Budget Plan Blog
channel.description: Practical, privacy-first budgeting articles from Budget Plan.

item.title: Give Every Dollar a Job: Mastering Expense Categorization
item.description: Learn how to effectively categorize your expenses within Budget Plan to gain control of your monthly finances and achieve your savings goals.

item.title: Set Your Budget in Your Local Currency
item.description: Learn how to change the currency within the Budget Plan app to accurately reflect your spending.

item.title: Accurately Track Expenses Daily with Budget Plan
item.description: Learn how to use the Budget Plan app to accurately track your daily expenses and stay on top of your monthly budget.

item.title: Zero-based budgeting without spreadsheets
item.description: A practical way to give every unit of income a job without turning your monthly budget into spreadsheet maintenance.
